findings.description: ContextIndicator component displays token usage as a progress bar with color coding (green <50%, yellow 50-80%, red >80%) and pulse animation at 80%+
findings.evidence: ContextIndicator.tsx: percentage calculation from inputTokens+outputTokens vs maxTokens, three color thresholds, animate-pulse at 80%+

findings.description: Shows detailed token breakdown on hover: input tokens, output tokens, cache read tokens, cache creation tokens
findings.evidence: ContextIndicator.tsx: isHovered state reveals detailed breakdown panel

findings.description: Compaction indicator ('Compacting...') shown when context window is being compacted
findings.evidence: ContextIndicator.tsx line 55-57: isCompacting prop renders yellow 'Compacting...' text

findings.description: ContextUsageSegment in status bar provides persistent context usage visibility
findings.evidence: StatusBar.tsx line 11: imports ContextUsageSegment in right section
